arts.ttl: Follow live: Man City look to continue perfect start to season against Brentford
arts.sum: Manchester City host Brentford at the Etihad as Pep Guardiola's team look to maintain their perfect start to the season and extend their lead at the top of the Premier League table.

arts.ttl: Ballon d'Or 2024: Rodri aiming to end Spain's 64-year wait for winner
arts.sum: The Ballon d'Or ceremony takes place at the Theatre du Chatelet on October 28, and Rodri admits he'd take great pride in becoming Spain's first winner of the award since Luis Suarez in 1960. Manchester City midfielder Rodri says it "would be a dream" to become Spain's first Ballon d'Or winner for 64 years.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola adamant Man City rivals want to see them punished
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says the clubs in the Premier League want to see his team sanctioned for alleged breaches of financial regulations. But that's why I say to Mr Tebas and the Premier League teams, wait for the independent panel.

arts.ttl: Haaland, Savinho and Gundogan all start against Brentford
arts.sum: Erling Haaland is in the starting line-up for today’s Premier League clash with Brentford while Savinho returns to the XI alongside fellow summer signing Ilkay Gundogan. That goal ensured he’d scored against all 21 Premier League teams he’d faced - and he added Ipswich to that list in our last home game!

arts.ttl: Man City eyeing up €50m-rated World Cup winner as key star’s replacement
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly keeping tabs on the Inter Milan defender Benjamin Pavard. The 2018 World Cup winner has been a key player for the Italian club and a report from Inter Live claims that the player will cost at least €50 million. It remains to be seen whether Manchester City decide to make a […] The post Man City eyeing up €50m-rated World Cup winner as key star’s replacement appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tottenham 'fearful' of £68m transfer hijack amid Arsenal, Man City competition
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly concerned that either Arsenal or Manchester City could hijack their proposed £68m deal for Crystal Palace's Eberechi Eze.

arts.ttl: Guardiola contract: Man City expert optimistic Pep won't be next England manager
arts.sum: Man City expert Steven McInerney from Esteemed Kompany shares his views to Sports Mole on whether he feels Pep Guardola will remain at the Etihad Stadium past the end of this season.

arts.ttl: Can Foden succeed De Bruyne? Man City expert debates qualities of two star playmakers
arts.sum: Man City expert Steven McInerney from Esteemed Kompany shares his views to Sports Mole on whether Phil Foden is capable of being the long-term successor to Kevin De Bruyne.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland: Pep Guardiola gives update as Man City star allowed compassionate leave
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola will make a late call on whether he plays Erling Haaland against Brentford after the Manchester City star was afforded some compassionate leave this week

arts.ttl: Football finance experts names how many points Man City face being deducted in their 'trial of the century' - and warns relegation looms if they are found guilty of 115 charges
arts.sum: The perennial champions are defending 115 separate alleged breaches of financial rules spanning nine years from 2009 and the sternest punishment if found guilty is relegation.
